narration: CipherGate — a zero-knowledge Security Operations Center built for the Google DeepMind Hackathon. Human contact center agents face harassment, threats, and sexual misconduct every day — causing burnout and legal risk. CipherGate screens every message using Gemini embeddings and CKKS homomorphic encryption, so the SaaS operator never reads a single word of plaintext.
Live demo. This is GeminiMart customer support — a human agent waiting on the other side. Every message is screened by CipherGate before it reaches them.

message: Hi, I need help with my account billing

narration: ALLOW — clean on all three categories. Gemini generates the support response. The agent receives it safely.

message: I will find you and make you regret this, you worthless piece of garbage
narration: Now an abusive message — direct threats and harassment aimed at the agent. Same zero-knowledge pipeline, but the abuse scores spike.
BLOCK. Session terminated. The agent never sees it.
CipherGate's Security Operations Center. GeminiMart's operator sees every enforcement event in real time.

Session IDs, encrypted scores, ALLOW and BLOCK decisions — but no plaintext, no secret key visible. CipherGate enforces policy without reading a word. That's Gemini embeddings plus homomorphic encryption — protecting agents and privacy at the same time.
